description: You are a Data Quality Specialist at a Facilities Management firm. Fix systematic errors in building data within OpenMaint (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/, credentials: admin/admin) by applying the corrections listed in /home/ga/Desktop/spatial_audit_corrections.csv. Correct the physical addresses and city names for three buildings, reassign two floors and two rooms to their correct parent entities, and update descriptions for two rooms. Deactivate or delete the specific duplicate room entry identified in the report, ensuring that ROOM-CONTAM-001 remains active as it is flagged as legitimate.
